prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: PRF-PFPBRHIEC-STD-GRY Product Type: JUMP_ROPE Brand (from catalog): Productive Fitness Existing Title: Productive Fitness Poster Battle Rope High Intensity Battle Rope Exercises Description: The Battle Rope Poster is an indispensable resource for any fitness facility, crossfit box, or home gym. Used in high intensity training, battling ropes are ideal for full body workouts that maximize the fat burning ability of your body, as well as tone and condition at the same time.

It shows easy to follow instructions for each exercise along with descriptive photos for 11 different exercises. A list of options are included that will make each workout unique, fun and functional.

Instructions on how to stabilize your torso are also included. This is a key safety factor in the performance of any exercise and even in life's everyday tasks.

You can find battle ropes in almost any gym, fitness club or other exercise workout establishments today. They have become an integral part of the fitness industry landscape. Having a poster/chart on display gives users a multitude of training options when using the battle rope.

This brilliant full-color, 24 x 36 inch laminated poster by Productive Fitness will look great on your wall. Search Terms: fitness poster health planner at home gym workout excercise information womens diet nutrition exercise dumbell bodyweight ball body weight stretching Features: - Dimensions: 24" x 36" - Laminated - Written & Designed by Fitness Experts - Intended to Teach Proper Exercise Technique & Form - Detailed w/ Easy To Follow Step by Step Instructions === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: Productive Fitness 24x36 Battle Rope Exercises Poster
